ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account's task was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the follow attempt */,
  "following_names" TEXT /* List of users being followed (comma-separated) */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of follow attempts made */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Number of follow attempts completed */,
  "following_success_count" INTEGER /* Number of successful follow attempts */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the follow task (percentage) */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow attempt */,
  "follow_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow attempt (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., follow, unfollow, like, comment) */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was created */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was completed */,
  "message" TEXT /* Additional message or notes about the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "following_list" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_name" TEXT /* Name of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was followed */,
  "unfollowed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was unfollowed */,
  "is_following" INTEGER /* Whether the user is currently being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_following_list_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., follow_success_rate) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification_preference) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., notification, account) */,
  "setting_options" TEXT /* Available options for the setting (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
